name: loop-engineer
description: Goal-loop harness skills: setup-harness and write-goal-prompt. NOTE: the Planner/Maker/Prover/Checker loop itself requires subagents and does not run under Codex.

interface.longDescription: Harness setup and goal-prompt authoring skills. The full agent loop is Claude-only.
defaultPrompt: Install the loop-engineer harness into this repo.
Write a goal prompt for this feature.
